title: Engineer (ACMV Maintenance)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement Planned Preventive Measures (PPM) schedules for M&E systems.
  • Ensure compliance with manufacturers’ guidelines, safety standards, and regulatory requirements.
  • Carry out general maintenance of M&E equipment, eg. cooling tower, pumps, low voltage (LV) electrical distribution system, fire protection system etc.
  • Maintain records of maintenance activities, equipment logs, and service reports.
  • Develop and maintain contingency plans for system breakdowns or emergencies.
  • Provide 24/7 technical support during critical issues, such as critical equipment down.
  • Diagnose and resolve faults or malfunctions in M&E systems.
  • Perform repairs on general M&E equipment.
  • Work closely with contractors or vendors when complex repairs are needed.
  • Prepare detailed incident reports for maintenance issues.
  • Manage inventory of spare parts, consumables, and tools.
  • Coordinate with procurement for replenishing parts based on maintenance needs.
  • Track equipment warranties and service contracts.
  • Engage with building managers and tenants to address maintenance and A&A work requirements.
  • Participate in site audits and inspections, ensuring quality and timeliness of maintenance work.
  • Supervise on-site technicians, ensuring adherence to safety protocols and maintenance standards.
  • Ensure all maintenance activities adhere to workplace safety and environmental standards.
  • Conduct regular risk assessments and ensure compliance with local regulatory requirements
  • Organize safety drills and routine inspections for emergency equipment.
  • Ensure compliance with regulatory documentation, such as safety certifications and inspection records.

Requirement

  • Degree/Diploma with at least 1 year of experience in engineering / technical support, preferably in data centre or critical environment. (ITE holder with relevant years of experience or fresh degree/diploma holder can be considered)
  • Strong understanding of energy management, electrical services, ACMV services, software and ability to interpret engineering drawings and technical manuals with high level of accuracy and attention to detail in execution and documentation.
  • Proficiency in control systems (BMS/EMS), server/network basics, and electrical/mechanical equipment monitoring.
  • Certification in workplace safety (eg. WSQ, WSH) preferred.
  • Experience in Microsoft Office (Microsoft Word, Excel and PowerPoint).
  • Positive proactive attitude and ethical behaviour.
  • Team player with ability to work independently and resolve challenges in a fast-paced environment.
  • Excellent interpersonal, communication, and collaborative skills.

postedCompany.description: Acme Associates Pte Ltd (ACME) offers Critical Infrastructure Lifecycle Solutions (CILS) for critical infrastructure like Data Centers, providing one-stop solution that includes Audit & Feasibility studies, Design & Build, Project Management and after sale support.
postedCompany.name: ACME ASSOCIATES PTE. LTD.
